[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for bankruptcy lawyer signals bearish XLF",
    "family": "consumer_stress",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly search interest for 'bankruptcy lawyer'",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "An uptick in bankruptcy lawyer searches indicates rising consumer financial distress, pressuring financial institutions.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLF",
      "rationale": "Higher consumer stress predicts increased loan defaults hitting financial sector earnings."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter short XLF if weekly search interest rises 15% week-over-week",
      "exit": "Exit after 3 weeks or if searches decline 10% week-over-week",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Consumer financial distress topics cycle frequently with monthly and quarterly reporting."
  },
